summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected, no GitHub mutations are recommended, and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked by the job. Security-shaped items that appear to involve auth stores, injection threat scanning, or public gateway hardening are quarantined individually.
